briefing.headline: Rig up a Texas Rig — aggressive fall approach for clear water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Texas Rig is a strong choice for fall with clear water and pre frontal conditions.

Wheeler: Peg the sinker on baits with a lot of action (craw-style); leave it unpegged on gliding-action baits like tubes so the weight slides away for better glide.

Key adjustment for pre frontal: aggressive, faster retrieves — fish are feeding actively before the front.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Peg the sinker on baits with a lot of action (craw-style); leave it unpegged on gliding-action baits like tubes so the weight slides away for better glide.
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: 'Fall spinnerbaits: downsize to 3/16oz in clear water with small blades to match young-of-year baitfish. For heavy grass, go bigger with willowleaf blades. To fish fast and deep, put smaller blades on a 3/4oz head — the Scorcher design lets y...

DeFronzo: Crimp a small split shot 18 inches above a size 1 hook with a 3-inch Ika Texas-rigged; keep a slow steady retrieve; effective up to 20ft — deeper than that you lose contact; add a grub guard for bottom snags and weed penetration; a glass...

Wheeler: The Punch Out Craw has five manifestations - full glide bait on 4/0 hook and 1/2-oz sinker, separated claws for football jig or Biffle Hardhead, trimmed small craw for swim jig/flipping jig/chatterbait/shakyhead, shortened torso for even ...

briefing.depthStrategy: Pre-frontal fall bass are following shad into the backs of creeks. Fish can be anywhere from 3-18ft depending on bait position. Target creek arms, secondary points, and anywhere baitfish are concentrating.
adjustIf: If the front stalls and conditions stabilize, dial back aggression and focus on higher-percentage structure
If water clarity decreases from wind or rain, upsize and switch to brighter colors
If bites dry up, try shaking in place for 10-15 seconds before moving — patience pays with plastics
